_meta.status: FICTIONAL DEMO ESTATE — all data invented for testing and public demos. Clearly labeled DEMO in every output.
_meta.location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos (fictional address: 1 Apex Gardens Drive)

payment_plans.name: 12-month plan
payment_plans.structure: 30% initial deposit, balance over 12 equal monthly installments

payment_plans.name: 18-month plan
payment_plans.structure: 35% initial deposit, balance over 18 equal monthly installments

inspection.physical: Tuesdays & Saturdays, 10am-4pm WAT, booked in advance
inspection.virtual: Live virtual inspections on video call: Tuesdays 7pm WAT and Saturdays 4pm WAT (diaspora-friendly slots)

faqs.a: Apex Gardens (DEMO) features underground power distribution, estate water treatment plant, covered drainage, CCTV and 24hr gated security.
Estimated service charge is ₦1.2m/year for condos and ₦1.8m/year for terraces/detached (DEMO figures), covering power, security, waste and facility management.
Phase 1 handover scheduled Q2 2027 (DEMO). Construction updates are shared monthly with buyers.
Units may be resold after 50% payment with a documented transfer process and 2% administrative fee (DEMO terms).

escalation_contacts.sales_lead: DEMO Sales Team (handoff simulated in sandbox)
